title: Making appropriations for the fiscal year 2026 for the maintenance of the departments, boards, commissions, institutions and certain activities of the Commonwealth, for interest, sinking fund and serial bond requirements, and for certain permanent improvements
summary: Making appropriations for the fiscal year 2026 for the maintenance of the departments, boards, commissions, institutions and certain activities of the Commonwealth, for interest, sinking fund and serial bond requirements, and for certain permanent improvements

actions.action: Reported from the committee of conference
Reported on a part of H4001
Referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting, the question being on acceptance
Committee of conference report accepted - 139 YEAS to 6 NAYS (See YEA and NAY No. 61 )

For message, see H4250
For actions on the section returned with recommendations of amendments, see H4248 for sections 20, 23 and 110
For actions on the section returned with recommendations of amendments, see H4249 for section 29
